front: What is ubiquitin-proteasome system and peptide degradation?
back: UPS degrades intracellular proteins: 1) E1 activates ubiquitin, 2) E2 transfers, 3) E3 ligase conjugates ubiquitin chains, 4) 26S proteasome recognizes poly-Ub, 5) 20S core degrades protein to peptides (8-25 aa). These peptides are further degraded by peptidases or presented on MHC class I.
